ai_ambition: Use AI to make our account managers more productive — reduce manual reporting work and help them give better real-time insights to clients
pain_points: Manual weekly reporting takes 4-6 hours per account manager
Campaign insights are delayed — clients ask questions we can't answer in real-time
New account managers take 3 months to get productive
existing_ai_initiatives: We use some vendor ML APIs for bid optimisation but nothing custom
competitors_doing: Competitors are starting to offer AI-generated campaign summary reports
